regions.name: character-creation
regions.description: The chamber where saved-world identities manage their characters.

regions.name: gloamharbor
regions.description: A salt-black harbor city gathered around the last ember lighthouse.

regions.name: whisperfen
regions.description: A marsh whose reeds repeat tomorrow’s last words.

regions.name: skyglass-scar
regions.description: The bright wound where a piece of the moon struck the earth.

regions.name: drowned-moon
regions.description: Flooded machinery beneath the crater, still counting impossible tides.

rooms.name: Character Creation Chamber
rooms.description: Soft cyan light bathes the minimalist chamber. Holographic interfaces flicker along the walls, ready to instantiate new personas.

rooms.name: Low-Tide Dock
rooms.description: A weathered arrival dock below Lantern Square. Empty skiffs knock against the pilings while the drowned moon paints silver roads across the harbor.

rooms.name: Lantern Square
rooms.description: Seven iron lanterns burn without oil around a dry fountain. Their flames lean toward the sea, where the drowned moon glows beneath the waves. A slate board reads: ORIGINS, HELP, and TALK ORRA.

rooms.name: The Saltmarket
rooms.description: Stalls made from overturned boats sell blue salt, bottled fog, and fish that hum when the moon rises. Pip’s patchwork awning is impossible to miss.

rooms.name: Pip’s Impossible Chandlery
rooms.description: Every shelf is too deep for the building. Brass keys sleep in teacups while moths price the merchandise by landing on it.

rooms.name: The Cinder Cup
rooms.description: A tavern built around the ribs of a fire-whale. Sable Gull serves meals that preserve memories better than ink.

rooms.name: The Ash Kitchen
rooms.description: Black pans hang over a communal campfire. Travelers leave ingredients inside the fire ring and let the old coals decide what they become.

rooms.name: Ember Lighthouse Steps
rooms.description: The lighthouse climbs from the harbor like a charred finger. Each step remembers the footfall of someone who never returned.

rooms.name: The Cracked Lens Gallery
rooms.description: A colossal amber lens turns by itself. Through its fracture, the moon under the sea appears to be watching back.

rooms.name: The Brine Gate
rooms.description: Salt-armored wardens guard the road into the fen. Beyond the arch, reeds scrape together like whispering knives.

rooms.name: The Reed Road
rooms.description: Flat stones sink and rise beneath black water. Far-off bells ring under the mud whenever someone speaks a lie.

rooms.name: The Singing Marsh
rooms.description: Silver reeds sing in several dead languages. Their melody bends east toward a bridge made from fused moonlight.

rooms.name: Nettle’s Walking Hut
rooms.description: The hut stands on six patient heron legs. Bundles of herbs dangle from the eaves and quietly discuss visitors.

rooms.name: The Sunken Bell Shrine
rooms.description: A stone bell protrudes from the mire. Something huge answers whenever rain strikes its green bronze surface.

rooms.name: The Glass Bridge
rooms.description: A translucent bridge arches over a bottomless seam. Stars are trapped inside it, crawling slowly beneath your feet.

rooms.name: The Crater Rim
rooms.description: Wind screams around a bowl of turquoise glass. Moonfall Camp huddles below a shield of patched sails.

rooms.name: Moonfall Camp
rooms.description: Cartographers hammer map pins directly into reality. A skyglass furnace burns beside Ivo’s tent.

rooms.name: The Crater Heart
rooms.description: The ground rings like a wineglass. A sealed stair descends beneath a door engraved with a bell split cleanly in two.

rooms.name: The Tide Vault
rooms.description: Water hangs in motionless spheres around brass walkways. Each sphere contains a different reflection of the sky.

rooms.name: The Drowned Observatory
rooms.description: Astronomers’ chairs face downward into a flooded dome. Their instruments track the moon below instead of the heavens.

rooms.name: The Moon Engine
rooms.description: An engine the size of a cathedral breathes seawater and exhales night. At its center, a captive shard dreams of becoming a moon again.

stat_definitions.name: Health
stat_definitions.description: How much harm an actor can withstand.

stat_definitions.name: Mana
stat_definitions.description: Arcane power spent on spells and magical abilities.

stat_definitions.name: Energy
stat_definitions.description: Fast-recovering power spent on physical techniques.

stat_definitions.name: Focus
stat_definitions.description: Concentration spent on precise or sustained techniques.

stat_definitions.name: Strength
stat_definitions.description: Physical power used by weapons and heavy actions.

stat_definitions.name: Defense
stat_definitions.description: Innate resistance before equipped armor is applied.

object_definitions.name: Firewood
object_definitions.description: A dry split log suitable for fuel.

object_definitions.name: Wooden Box
object_definitions.description: A simple container for loose possessions.

object_definitions.name: Campfire
object_definitions.description: A stone-ringed fire that burns while it has fuel.

object_definitions.name: Iron Sword
object_definitions.description: A dependable one-handed blade.

object_definitions.name: Leather Armor
object_definitions.description: Flexible protection made from boiled leather.

object_definitions.name: Healing Potion
object_definitions.description: A crimson restorative draught.

object_definitions.name: Raw Moonfish
object_definitions.description: A translucent fish with constellations moving beneath its skin.

object_definitions.name: Ghost Salt
object_definitions.description: Blue salt harvested from the footprints of drowned sailors.

object_definitions.name: Ember-Seared Moonfish
object_definitions.description: Crisp at the edges and filled with a warm memory that is not yours.

object_definitions.name: Whisper Reed
object_definitions.description: A silver reed that repeats the last secret spoken nearby.

object_definitions.name: Moonshard
object_definitions.description: A sharp fragment of cold skyglass, valuable and faintly homesick.

object_definitions.name: Sunken Bell Fragment
object_definitions.description: Green bronze that vibrates when pointed toward deep water.

object_definitions.name: Drowned Bell Key
object_definitions.description: A key shaped like the silence after a bell stops ringing.

object_definitions.name: Fallen Moon Core
object_definitions.description: A fist-sized knot of night, beating to the rhythm of the tides.

object_definitions.name: Tideglass Blade
object_definitions.description: A sword whose edge flows backward through each swing.

object_definitions.name: Reedcloak
object_definitions.description: A living cloak that rustles warnings before danger arrives.

object_definitions.name: Hearthstar Charm
object_definitions.description: A tiny artificial star, warm enough to keep one mortal promise alive.

object_definitions.name: Ember Oil
object_definitions.description: Thick orange oil that burns with a patient, smokeless flame.

object_definitions.name: Skyglass Furnace
object_definitions.description: A moon-crystal furnace used to soften things that should not melt.

object_definitions.name: Ward Lantern
object_definitions.description: An iron lantern containing one stubborn ember of dawn.

faction_definitions.name: The Mire Covenant
faction_definitions.description: Witches, ferrymen, and listeners who bargain with the marsh.

faction_definitions.name: The Moonless Choir
faction_definitions.description: Creatures trying to sing the fallen moon awake.

npcs.name: Keeper Orra Vey
npcs.description: The lighthouse keeper wears a coat sewn with maps of vanished coastlines.

npcs.name: Moth-Crowned Pip
npcs.description: A tiny merchant under a crown of sleepy white moths.

npcs.name: Sable Gull
npcs.description: A broad-shouldered cook with a gull feather for every meal she remembers.

npcs.name: Warden Brin Saltcoat
npcs.description: A patient guard in armor crusted white with protective salt.
npcs.guard_greeting: Brin taps two fingers to his salt-white helm. “Lanterns high, traveler.”

npcs.name: Grandmother Nettle
npcs.description: A marsh witch whose shadow is an enormous heron.

npcs.name: Ivo Nine-Maps
npcs.description: A cartographer who claims eight of his maps are accurate and refuses to identify the liar.

npcs.name: Cathedral Bell-Toad
npcs.description: A house-sized toad with a bronze bell where its throat should be.

npcs.name: Choir Reed-Stalker
npcs.description: A deer-shaped knot of reeds with a drowned chorister singing inside.

npcs.name: Skyglass Wight
npcs.description: A former prospector reflected into too many sharp versions of herself.

npcs.name: Inverted Moon-Seraph
npcs.description: A many-winged sentinel swimming through the air as though it were deep water.

npcs.name: The Drowned Moon
npcs.description: A dreaming lunar intelligence wearing a body of seawater, gears, and stolen faces.

ability_definitions.name: Firebolt
ability_definitions.description: Hurl a bolt of fire at an enemy.

ability_definitions.name: Lantern Flare
ability_definitions.description: Throw a hooked ribbon of lighthouse flame.

ability_definitions.name: Mire Mend
ability_definitions.description: Borrow tomorrow’s health from a willing marsh.

ability_definitions.name: Shardstep
ability_definitions.description: Step through a reflection and strike from its broken edge.

ability_definitions.name: Moonwake
ability_definitions.description: Call a healing tide from the moon beneath the sea.

quest_definitions.title: The First Light
quest_definitions.description: Inspect the cracked lighthouse lens and return to Keeper Orra.

quest_definitions.title: A Meal for Memory
quest_definitions.description: Learn Sable’s hearthcraft and bring her Ember-Seared Moonfish.

quest_definitions.title: The Bell Below
quest_definitions.description: Defeat the Cathedral Bell-Toad and recover a fragment of the sunken bell.

quest_definitions.title: Across the Glass Road
quest_definitions.description: Reach the crater heart, defeat its wight, and recover a Moonshard.

quest_definitions.title: A Moon Must Learn to Sink
quest_definitions.description: Enter the Moon Engine, defeat the Drowned Moon, and return its core to Orra.

quest_objectives.description: Tell Orra what looked back through the lens.
Carry the Fallen Moon Core back to Orra.
Decide whether to rekindle the moon-engine or let the drowned moon sleep.

quest_choices.label: Rekindle the moon-engine
quest_choices.description: Give Gloamharbor a second artificial dawn.

quest_choices.label: Let the drowned moon sleep
quest_choices.description: Return the deep tides to the Mire Covenant.

character_option_definitions.name: Tideborn
character_option_definitions.description: Descendants of people who survived three days beneath the sea; resilient and moon-touched.

character_option_definitions.name: Cinderkin
character_option_definitions.description: Harbor folk carrying a coal from the first lighthouse where a heart should be.

character_option_definitions.name: Lantern Knight
character_option_definitions.description: A durable sword-bearer who hooks enemies with lighthouse flame.

character_option_definitions.name: Mire Singer
character_option_definitions.description: A healer who bargains with tomorrow’s marsh and remembers forbidden songs.

character_option_definitions.name: Shardwright
character_option_definitions.description: A quick fighter and crafter trained to step through broken reflections.

character_option_definitions.name: Bell Smuggler
character_option_definitions.description: You know which bells are legal, which are haunted, and which can be bribed.

character_option_definitions.name: Lost Mapmaker
character_option_definitions.description: You draw roads before they exist and occasionally they obey.

crafting_recipes.name: Ember-Seared Moonfish
crafting_recipes.description: Place Raw Moonfish and Ghost Salt inside a lit Campfire, then cook for four seconds.

crafting_recipes.name: Skyglass Edge
crafting_recipes.description: Reforge an Iron Sword with a Moonshard inside a lit Skyglass Furnace.

crafting_recipes.name: Ember Tonic
crafting_recipes.description: A quick mixture of Whisper Reed and Ghost Salt.

spawn_points.name: Lantern Square Arrival
spawn_points.description: New Lanternbound awaken beside the seven undying lamps.

spawn_points.name: Nettle’s Safe Hut
spawn_points.description: The hut shelters those lost in the Whisperfen.

spawn_points.name: Moonfall Infirmary
spawn_points.description: Canvas cots beneath a shield of moonproof sails.

spawn_points.name: Drowned-Moon Recovery
spawn_points.description: Those pulled from the lower vaults wake at Moonfall Camp.

profession_definitions.name: Hearthcraft
profession_definitions.description: Cooking memories into meals over living flame.

profession_definitions.name: Glasswrighting
profession_definitions.description: Forging skyglass without letting it remember the moon.

dialogue_nodes.text: Prices are firm, except when the moths vote otherwise. Try SHOP, BANK, or SELL.
The fen lies west. Carry a light, distrust polite water, and return before the reeds learn your name.
The moon drowned twelve years ago. Tonight, something inside the lighthouse lens blinked. Will you look?
We keep the ember lit so the moon remembers which world it belongs beneath. If it rises, the sea will fall upward.
A good meal can anchor a memory. Mine are escaping. I can teach you the hearthcraft and the moonfish recipe.
The bell beneath the marsh has grown a throat. Silence it, child, and bring me a piece of its voice.
The key is not metal. It is the shape left behind when a true bell falls silent.
My ninth map points through the crater and down into a moon that should not exist. Naturally, it is the only map I trust.

dialogue_choices.label: I will cook for your memory.
I will cross the glass road.
Teach me to forge a Skyglass Edge.
Show me the road into the Drowned Moon.

world_triggers.actions_json: [{"kind":"message","text":"The reeds whisper your name one syllable before you speak it."}]
[{"kind":"message","text":"For one heartbeat, your reflection keeps walking after you stop."}]
[{"kind":"message","text":"The Moon Engine inhales. Every lantern in Gloamharbor goes dark for one impossible second."}]
